name: switch
title: Switch
description: A glossy aqua toggle with a glassy thumb.

files.content:
<script lang="ts">
	import { Switch as SwitchPrimitive, type WithoutChildrenOrChild } from 'bits-ui';
	import { cn } from '$lib/utils.js';

	let {
		ref = $bindable(null),
		checked = $bindable(false),
		class: className,
		...restProps
	}: WithoutChildrenOrChild<SwitchPrimitive.RootProps> & { class?: string } = $props();
</script>

<SwitchPrimitive.Root
	bind:ref
	bind:checked
	class={cn(
		'peer inline-flex h-6 w-11 shrink-0 cursor-pointer items-center rounded-full border border-border shadow-pressed outline-none transition-[background-image,background-color] duration-200 focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 focus-visible:ring-offset-background disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50 data-[state=checked]:gradient-primary data-[state=unchecked]:bg-muted',
		className
	)}
	{...restProps}
>
	<SwitchPrimitive.Thumb
		class="pointer-events-none block size-5 rounded-full bg-white shadow-bevel transition-transform duration-200 ease-out data-[state=checked]:translate-x-[1.375rem] data-[state=unchecked]:translate-x-0.5"
	/>
</SwitchPrimitive.Root>
